message:
perf(fwc): pre-cache lowercase fields and fix search test field synchronization

Pre-cache lowercase fields on DiscoveredOperation and
DiscoveredConnector at construction time rather than computing them
during every search scoring pass.  The new fields
(search_actual_id_lower, search_local_id_lower, search_aliases_lower,
search_summary_lower, search_when_to_use_lower,
search_capability_lower, search_common_mistakes_lower,
search_related_lower on operations; search_slug_lower,
search_name_lower, search_cohort_lower on connectors) are populated
once when the struct is built — in host_discovered_connector(),
DiscoveredConnector::from_manifest(), DiscoveredOperation::from_spec(),
and discovered_operation_from_toml() — and the search scoring code
reads them directly.

The readiness and main.rs constructors move the lowercase computation
before the struct literal to avoid borrow-after-move issues when the
original strings are consumed into the struct.

Search tests that mutate fields like aliases, common_mistakes, or
related now also set the corresponding search_*_lower fields so that
the scoring code sees the test mutation.

Bench helper stubs and export_tools test stubs updated with the new
required fields (initialized to empty strings/vecs since bench scoring
is the focus, not search completeness).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -43,6 +43,14 @@ fn stub_operation(id: &str, desc: &str) -> DiscoveredOperation {
         related: vec![],
         network_constraints: None,
         rate_limits: Some(vec![]),
+        search_actual_id_lower: String::new(),
+        search_local_id_lower: String::new(),
+        search_aliases_lower: Vec::new(),
+        search_summary_lower: String::new(),
+        search_when_to_use_lower: String::new(),
+        search_capability_lower: String::new(),
+        search_common_mistakes_lower: Vec::new(),
+        search_related_lower: Vec::new(),
     }
 }
 
@@ -84,6 +92,9 @@ fn stub_connector(slug: &str, op_count: usize) -> DiscoveredConnector {
         capabilities: json!({}),
         connector_schema: json!({}),
         operations: ops,
+        search_slug_lower: String::new(),
+        search_name_lower: String::new(),
+        search_cohort_lower: String::new(),
     }
 }
